author: matkt0
content:
<@703742742135570499> 

this is the binary branch https://github.com/matkt/besu/tree/stateless/binary-trie we tested simple transfert with geth and we ave consensus 

you should start besu with `--data-storage-format=BINTRIE` it will be by default with a stem flat db mode (read directly the leaf of the trie), there is another flat db mode `--Xbintrie-flat-db-mode=FULL` (duplicate account and slot in another column) more similar to what we have today with bonsai but the target is more the stem flat db mode

I didn't checked the compatibility with BAL,  I need to merge main before

The genesis should have 'binTrieTime'
